widget.convert: {"template": [ MultiContentEntryText(pos=(0, 0), size=(48, 48), font=1, color = 0x00ffffff, color_sel = 0x00ffffff, backcolor_sel = None, flags = RT_HALIGN_CENTER|RT_VALIGN_CENTER|RT_WRAP, text = 2), MultiContentEntryText(pos=(50, 0), size=(260, 48), font=0, color = 0x00ffffff, color_sel = 0x00ffffff, backcolor_sel = None, flags = RT_HALIGN_LEFT|RT_VALIGN_CENTER|RT_WRAP, text = 1), ], "fonts": [gFont("xstreamityregular", 18), gFont("klass", 32)], "itemHeight": 48, "scrollbarMode": "showNever" }
